# source: live tmux capture of Codex in-TUI /resume session picker
# codex version: v0.142.0 (gpt-5.5 high)
# capture method: launched `codex --no-alt-screen --sandbox workspace-write --ask-for-approval never`
#   in testingmurderharness dir, typed /resume (autocomplete confirmed "resume a saved chat"),
#   pressed Enter to open picker
# picker layout: inline overlay (no-alt-screen mode) with header "Resume a previous session",
#   search box ("Type to search"), filter/sort toggles (Filter: [Cwd] All / Sort: [Updated] Created),
#   session entries each 1 line: age + first-user-message / slash command, selected entry marked ❯
#   status bar: "1 / 18 · 100%"
# key hints: enter resume, esc exit, ctrl+c exit, tab focus sort/filter, ←/→ change option,
#   ctrl+o comfortable view, ctrl+t transcript, ctrl+e expand, ↑/↓ browse
# note: /resume IS present in codex's slash-command menu ("resume a saved chat")
# scrub: shell prompt user@host -> user@machine; /home/<username> -> /home/user; session titles
#   are generic test prompts, no PII found

╭──────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ >_ OpenAI Codex (v0.142.0)                       │
│                                                  │
│ model:     gpt-5.5 high   /model to change       │
│ directory: ~/Documents/code/testingmurderharness │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

  Tip: Use /skills to list available skills or ask Codex to use one.

• You have 2 usage limit resets available. Run /usage to use one.
 Resume a previous session

 Type to search                                                                                                                                           Filter: [Cwd] All    Sort: [Updated] Created

 enter resume   esc exit   ctrl+c exit   tab focus sort/filter   ←/→ change option
